lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਮਨਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਵੂਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal man amrit vootthaa |
lines.english: My mind and body have been cooled and soothed; the Ambrosial Nectar rains down in my mind.
I am unworthy and ungrateful, but He has been merciful to me.
Slave Nanak beholds the Lord, enraptured. ||4||10||23||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The Supreme Lord God, the Guru, has become kind and compassionate to me.
My True Guru is totally independent.
My True Guru is adorned with Truth.
My True Guru is the Giver of all.
My True Guru is the Primal Creator Lord, the Architect of Destiny. ||1||
There is no deity equal to the Guru.
My True Guru is the Sustainer and Cherisher of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਸੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis masatak bhaag su laagaa sev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whoever has good destiny inscribed on his forehead, applies himself to seva - selfless service. ||1||Pause||
Has become manifest everywhere. ||2||
My True Guru kills and revives.
The glorious greatness of my True Guru
My True Guru is my home and court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai hau sad bal jaaeaa |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to the True Guru.
My True Guru is the power of the powerless.
He has shown me the path. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਉ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin gur seviaa tis bhau na biaapai |
lines.english: One who serves the Guru is not afflicted with fear.
Nanak has studied the Simritees and the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਸੰਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin gur seviaa tis dukh na santaapai |
lines.english: One who serves the Guru does not suffer in pain.
There is no difference between the Supreme Lord God and the Guru. ||4||11||24||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Repeating the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mortal is exalted and glorified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਤ ਪਾਪੁ ਤਨ ਤੇ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam lait paap tan te geaa |
lines.english: Repeating the Naam, sin is banished from the body.
Repeating the Naam, all festivals are celebrated.
My sacred shrine of pilgrimage is the Name of the Lord.
Repeating the Naam, one is cleansed at the sixty-eight sacred shrines. ||1||
Repeating the Naam, the mortal's pains are taken away.
Repeating the Naam, the most ignorant people become spiritual teachers.
The Guru has instructed me in the true essence of spiritual wisdom. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਤ ਜਮੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam lait jam nerr na aavai |
lines.english: Repeating the Naam, the Messenger of Death does not draw near.
Repeating the Naam, the Divine Light blazes forth.
Repeating the Naam, one's bonds are broken. ||2||
The Guru has instructed me in these sublime teachings.
Repeating the Naam, one finds peace in the Court of the Lord.
Repeating the Naam, God gives His Approval.
The Naam is my true wealth. ||3||
Nanak is saved through the atonement of the Naam.
Other actions are just to please and appease the people. ||4||12||25||
The Kirtan of the Lord's Praises and the Naam are the Support of the mind.
I bow in humble worship, tens of thousands of times.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man deejai taa kau vaar |
lines.english: I offer this mind as a sacrifice.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Such is the diamond, the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Bliss wells up, and no disease is contracted. ||1||
Meditating in remembrance on Him, sufferings are erased.
The mind seizes the cooling, soothing, Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਦੁਖ ਡੇਰਾ ਢਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee drisatt dukh dderaa dtahai |
lines.english: Beholding Him, the house of pain is demolished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਸੁ ਜਪਤ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਭਿ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaas japat pooran sabh kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting it, all works are perfectly completed. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਭਗਤ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਪੂਜਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: anik bhagat jaa ke charan poojaaree |
lines.english: Millions of devotees worship His Feet.
In an instant, He fills the empty to over-flowing.
He is the Fulfiller of all the mind's desires. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਨਿਮਾਣੇ ਕਉ ਦੀਨੋ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khin meh nimaane kau deeno maan |3|
lines.english: In an instant, He bestows honor on the dishonored. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਨਿਥਾਵੇ ਕਉ ਦੀਨੋ ਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh nithaave kau deeno thaan |
lines.english: In an instant, He gives the homeless a home.
In an instant, He transforms the dry into green.
